item.title:
JoshACarpenter: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 9min Harris English spoke to @AdamSchupak about LIV players returning.
“We’ll have t
item.description:
Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 9min Harris English spoke to @AdamSchupak about LIV players returning.
“We’ll have to figure something out because adding some of those guys will put our Tour back where it belongs with our TV contracts coming up. That would be a good position to be in." De golfweek.usatoday.com 432

item.title: KVanValkenburg: Kevin Van Valkenburg @KVanValkenburg · 9min Jon Rahm showing up to the 2027 season opener. Cita Josh Carpenter @JoshACar
item.description:
Kevin Van Valkenburg @KVanValkenburg · 9min Jon Rahm showing up to the 2027 season opener. Cita Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 34min Oliver Wilson asked Scott O’Neil about LIV’s funding:
“The reality is that you’re funded through the season, and then you work like crazy as a business to create a business and a business plan to keep us going. But that’s not different from any other private equity-funded 1 1 26 2 mil

item.title:
jamierkennedy: Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 12min Palmer Player
The Old Course, in reverse.
Yes, the pair played a $10k money matc
item.description:
Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 12min Palmer Player
The Old Course, in reverse.
Yes, the pair played a $10k money match in 1961 at the Old Course in the reverse.
You can see them here, clearly walking backwards on the Road Hole tee (the 2nd hole in the reverse routing). 1 4 511

“The reality is that you’re funded through the season, and then you work like crazy as a business to create a business and a business plan to keep us going. But that’s not different from any other private equity-funded Mostrar más 3 1 13 5 mil
